page.content: In January 2024, DuPont de Nemours reported a total sales amount of CHF67M, representing 100% of the sales mix, categorized under Coatings and Adhesives, with a stable status across all regions. The coatings segment generated CHF30M, accounting for 45% of total sales, marked as on track in Europe for the year 2024, with a growth rate of 12.5%, using acrylic coating type. The coatings overview for the North region contributed CHF10M, or 15%, also on track, utilizing polyurethane and silicone types, reflecting an 8.0% growth rate.

lines.text: In January 2024, DuPont de Nemours reported a total sales amount of CHF67M, representing 100% of the sales mix,
categorized under Coatings and Adhesives, with a stable status across all regions. The coatings segment generated CHF30M,
accounting for 45% of total sales, marked as on track in Europe for the year 2024, with a growth rate of 12.5%, using acrylic
coating type. The coatings overview for the North region contributed CHF10M, or 15%, also on track, utilizing polyurethane
and silicone types, reflecting an 8.0% growth rate.

page.content: The adhesives overview in the South achieved CHF20M, 30% of total sales, but is behind target for 2024 with a growth rate of 5.5%, using hot melt and water-based types. Additionally, CHF12M from the Central region, 20% of total, was on target with acrylic type, while the East region generated CHF15M, representing 22% of total sales, but is behind target using epoxy type. In the polymer production overview, total production volumes reached 40,000 tonnes, generating revenue of CHF3,000,000, with a net income of €850M, CAPEX of ¥125B, and a market share of 81%, reflecting a growth rate of 46%. The polymer types produced included polyethylene at 15,000 tonnes, polypropylene at 12,000 tonnes, PVC at 8,000 tonnes, polystyrene at 5,000 tonnes, acrylic at 3,000 tonnes, and others at 2,000 tonnes.
